projectName: Elementify MCP PRD v2/v3 Completion - Remaining Enhancements

execution_recommendation.reason: 6 development tasks with parallelization opportunities, estimated 8-12 hours total

tasks.title: Implement AI-powered batch string translation
tasks.description: Replace placeholder in translation.ts with actual AI-powered batch translation via FaiGate integration. Implement translate_strings tool that hooks into WPML/Polylang string translation with context-aware prompts.
acceptanceCriteria: translate_strings tool accepts string arrays and target language
Integration with FaiGate config from ~/.elementify/config.json
Returns translation results with confidence scores
Handles batch translation with progress reporting
Governance level L2 (auto-queue) as per product-tiers.ts

tasks.title: Implement built-in accessibility scanner
tasks.description: Build the built-in accessibility scanner referenced as TODO in Ally.php. Create scanner that parses _elementor_data for WCAG violations (headings, alt text, color contrast).
acceptanceCriteria: New tool scan_accessibility (Free tier) implemented
Scanner detects missing alt text, heading hierarchy issues, low color contrast
Returns structured violations with severity levels
Integration with existing ally.ts tools
Can run independently of Elementor Ally plugin

tasks.title: Confirm booking integration release readiness
tasks.description: Verify booking.ts implementation and update roadmap. Check if Amelia/SSA/TEC tools are fully implemented and ready for release. Update ROADMAP.md status.
acceptanceCriteria: Review booking.ts tools for completeness
Test booking tools with mock data
Update ROADMAP.md to change 'Planned Integration' to 'Implemented'
Ensure booking tools are properly registered in product-tiers.ts
Verify plugin-side API endpoints exist

tasks.title: Add missing export tools
tasks.description: Implement export tools for Import-Export module. Add mass_export tool for bulk export of posts/pages/products as CSV/JSON with filters.
acceptanceCriteria: New tool mass_export implemented in import-export.ts
Supports filtering by post_type, category, date range, status
Output formats: CSV and JSON
Governance level L2 (auto-queue for large exports)
Integration with existing import_external_data tool

tasks.title: Fix wizards cached assessment placeholder
tasks.description: Replace placeholder assessment data in Wizards.php with actual cached assess_site data. Ensure wizards can access comprehensive site assessment for recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: Wizards use actual assess_site cached data instead of placeholder
All 7 wizards (ACF, Forms, Comments, etc.) receive proper assessment input
Wizard recommendations are based on real site state
Backward compatibility maintained for sites without cached data

tasks.title: Implement mirror-export verification for public Free repository
tasks.description: Create verification system for mirror export to ensure Free tier tools are correctly separated from Advanced. Implement checks that prevent Advanced tools from leaking to public mirror.
acceptanceCriteria: Script to verify mirror export contains only Free tier tools
Check product-tiers.ts consistency between main repo and mirror
Automated validation in CI pipeline
Documentation for mirror maintenance process
